Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
122 
PRVDR_ORG_NAME 
LABEL: 
Provider Organization Name 
DESCRIPTION: The name of the provider when the provider is an organization; most recent in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ORG_NAME 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_ORG_NAME 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
90 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Text string (e.g., MIDWEST HEALTH SERVICES LLC, NURSES
